ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Adani Power Limited has submitted a routine regulatory compliance filing, enclosing a certificate from its Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA), Kfin Technologies Limited, for the quarter ended June 30, 2026. The RTA confirms compliance with SEBI Regulation 74(5), certifying the proper handling of dematerialized and rematerialized securities and the timely submission of required details to depositories and stock exchanges. This document indicates standard operational compliance regarding investor services and presents no material impacts or red flags.
